title: SOC Investigator — Air-Gapped IOC Triage (Defender → VirusTotal → Sentinel)
description: A cowork SOC playbook for locked-down tenants where the CTO forbids API/MCP/Entra access. Claude generates per-machine-type Defender hunting KQL, walks you through running and exporting it in your OWN authenticated browser, enriches the IOCs locally with your VirusTotal key, then prepares the Sentinel blast-radius pivot and a human-confirmed incident-closure package — no keys or raw tenant data ever leave your machine. Closes the loop with Threat Sentinel (soc-update.com) over a CSV bridge: import its IOC exports, push findings back as soc_report.csv. Ships an enrichment engine, query generator, KQL references, flow diagrams, and a bundled agent definition.
usage: Fill assets/config.example.json with your IOCs and machine groups, then ask Claude to "run the SOC investigation". It generates the Defender KQL, guides you through the Defender/Sentinel exports in your own Chrome, enriches locally with your VT_API_KEY, and prepares the incident-close list for you to confirm.
